violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Cover sheet trays of chicken in walk in cooler after cooling process is complete. Chicken from previous day left uncovered.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Bulk storage bins for flour, sugar, & salt have a build up of food debris and need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving units/racks in walk in cooler and in prep area of kitchen all have food debris build up and need cleaning.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Store immersion blender away from unprotected drain lines under prep sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk in cooler floor has pooling water and food debris and is in need of cleaning.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Bucket sanitizer too low. Chemical dispenser at 3 tub sink has disconnected line. Unable to provide dispenser with chemical sanitizer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Accumulation of food debris and dust on shelving units and lower storage shelves in prep area. Needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under equipment and storage units in walk in cooler and on prep lines. Spilled sauces and build-up of food and debris need to be cleaned up.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
